trial.note: An App Store payment method is required like any subscription, but nothing is charged during the 7 days. One trial per Apple ID. Trial grants full Pro-equivalent access.

note: Despite the name, AiQo Intelligence Pro is the HIGHER tier. The internal enum value '.max' is the entry paid tier; '.pro' is the top tier.

tiers.name: Free
highlights: Home dashboard and Apple Health tracking

tiers.name: AiQo Max
tiers.tagline: All AiQo basics for your daily life
highlights: Full Gym, workouts, and Zone-2 coaching
Sleep: Smart Wake and on-device analysis
Apple Watch app, badges, and XP

tiers.name: AiQo Intelligence Pro
tiers.tagline: The most powerful tier for breaking records and analysis
highlights: Multi-week workout plans and photo/form analysis
Directives and early access to new features
